pi_items.source: Verified via export_result.sh and setup_task.sh which explicitly define and clean up this file path.
Verified via verifier.py which hardcodes these exact headers for regex matching and scoring.
Verified via export_result.sh which queries places.sqlite for this exact URL.

privileged_info_summary: The required output path for the audit report is /home/ga/Documents/tor-audit-report.txt. The verifier checks that the report contains the following 5 exact section headers: '--- Application Info ---', '--- Installed Extensions ---', '--- Security Settings ---', '--- Tor Network Verification ---', and '--- Audit Metadata ---'. It also verifies that the Tor Browser history (places.sqlite) contains a visit to check.torproject.org.
